title: Synaptic
description:
Synaptic is a 3D first-person shooter game inspired by the works of David Lynch in which the main character must explore an unsettlingly organic environment, following the trail of a glowing spark to uncover the secrets hidden within. Play through 4 different levels, shooting down targets with nostalgic bullets as you fill up your childhood journal.

Features voice acted dialogue, 3 unique hand weapons, and an unsettling organic environment.
